insight: For the Czechia team in the 2026 World Cup, hydration breaks have had a mixed impact on their momentum. On average, they tend to lose a bit of momentum after a break, with a mean change of -0.150 per minute, indicating a slight decline in performance. However, the numbers also suggest that when Czechia is pressing before a break, they tend to lose more momentum afterwards, with an average change of -0.300 per minute, and they were unable to regain their momentum after the break in the one instance this occurred. In contrast, when they are not pressing before a break, they are able to maintain their momentum, with no change in performance, as seen in the one instance where this happened.
